steps.title: Find the shared condition
steps.content: Text 1 calls separating root systems an essential step, and Text 2 calls it a necessary precaution. Text 2 doubts whether Chen's full design proves CMN transfer, but both texts agree root-to-root transfer must first be ruled out.

steps.title: Reject stronger claims
steps.content: A invents a finding about Zhao's results. B says excluding root transfer is sufficient, but Text 2 explicitly says other pathways could remain. D would block fungal strands too, which would prevent testing CMN transfer. The shared prerequisite is excluding root-to-root transfer. The answer is C.
